title: Teyleria stricta
taxonomy: Teyleria stricta is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This family is commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The Rubiaceae family consists of approximately 13,000 species, making it one of the largest and most diverse plant families. The classification of Teyleria stricta is part of a broader group of flowering plants called angiosperms, which also includes other families such as Orchidaceae and Asteraceae. Teyleria stricta is further classified as a member of the order Gentianales.
